headlines.headline: Krevan Investments explores strategic alternatives for cloud infrastructure unit

headlines.headline: Jovik Asset Group secures $120M contract with an international consortium

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $120M contract is a direct and significant positive impact on future revenue and order backlog.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
